feat_brawler_young_blood.name: Young Blood
feat_brawler_young_blood.description: Only at level 0, you gain a +1 bonus to your hit point maximum and your unarmed strikes deal 1d4 bludgeoning damage plus your Strength or Dexterity modifier.

feat_brawler_fwyc.name: From Whence You Came
feat_brawler_fwyc.description: Upon reaching level 1, you may choose a feat to represent the training from your humble beginnings.

feat_athlete_asp.name: Athlete (Aspiration)
feat_athlete_asp.description:
You have undergone extensive physical training to gain the following benefits:

* When you are prone, standing up uses only 1.5 meters of your movement.
* Climbing doesn't cost you extra movement.
* You can make a running long jump or a running high jump after moving only 1.5 meters on foot, rather than 3 meters.

feat_tavern_brawler_asp.name: Tavern Brawler (Aspiration)
feat_tavern_brawler_asp.description:
Accustomed to rough-and-tumble fighting using whatever weapons happen to be at hand, you gain the following benefits:

* You are proficient with improvised weapons.
* Your unarmed strike uses a d4 for damage.
* When you hit a creature with an unarmed strike or an improvised weapon on your turn, you can use a Bonus Action to attempt to grapple the target.

aspirations.name: Brawler
aspirations.description: A beginner's guide to raw combat, throwing punches, and enduring blows.
aspirations.starting_equipment:
You start with the following equipment, in addition to the equipment granted by your background:
* 5 gold pieces
* Common clothes, 2 rations, waterskin
* Trinket
